news.headline: Boot Barn Holdings, Inc. to reveal Q2 fiscal year 2025 report on October 28, 2024. Earnings ended September 28, 2024. Conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET to discuss results. Call (844) 481-2552 to join.
news.summary: Boot Barn Holdings, Inc. disclosed plans to unveil its second-quarter fiscal year 2025 financial results, covering the period ending September 28, 2024. The announcement is set to happen post-market closure on Monday, October 28, 2024. A conference call moderated by management is scheduled for the same day at 4:30 p.m. ET (1:30 p.m. PT) to delve into the financial outcomes. Stakeholders and analysts keen on joining the discussion can dial (844) 481-2552 at 4:20 p.m.

news.headline: FDA accepted NDA for brain cancer imaging agent TLX101-CDx (Pixclara®), with PDUFA goal date of April 26, 2025. U.S. launch planned for 2025.
news.summary: Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited made an announcement today that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration has accepted the New Drug Application for their product TLX101-CDx (Pixclara®), which is used for imaging glioma. The application has been granted priority review and given a PDUFA goal date of April 26, 2025. This development sets the stage for a commercial launch in the U.S. in 2025.

news.headline: CareMonitor selects 8x8 CPaaS, enabling critical patient interactions. 8x8, Inc. (NASDAQ: EGHT) is the provider.
news.summary: In Campbell, California, 8x8, Inc. (NASDAQ: EGHT) has revealed that CareMonitor has implemented the 8x8 CPaaS for facilitating vital patient communications.

news.headline: Capella Space secures contract with Space Development Agency for LEO satellite systems via HALO, increasing bid capabilities.
news.summary: Capella Space Corp., a US-based space technology company offering data and satellite services for both government and commercial uses, has disclosed its acceptance into the Hybrid Acquisition for Proliferated LEO (HALO) other transaction authority (OTA) procurement program. Through this initiative, Capella Space will have the opportunity to compete for prototype contracts to develop satellite systems for the Space Development Agency (SDA). The company possesses a network of satellites and is set to pursue building systems for the SDA.

Head of Strategy at Bitwise predicts Bitcoin may reach $92,000 if Trump wins, using a probability model correlating price to election odds.
news.summary: Jeff Park, the Head of Alpha Strategies at Bitwise, made a bold prediction that if Donald Trump wins the election, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) could surge to $92,000. Using a merger arbitrage-style probability model, Park linked Bitcoin's price changes to Trump's election chances and estimated that a Trump victory could potentially drive Bitcoin to around $92,000. Analyzing Bitcoin's price movements against Trump's odds from 8/15 to 10/20 on a chart, it is evident that there were significant fluctuations, especially during times when Harris and Trump were in the lead alternately. This analysis and projection were shared in a post on X and the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Learn more about crypto candidate Jerrod Sessler in the 2024 US Elections via Cointelegraph's interviews with congressional candidates.
news.summary: In regards to the 2024 US Elections, Cointelegraph reached out to a number of congressional candidates to inquire about their stances on cryptocurrency.

news.headline: ETH price plummeting under $2.5K ignites Ethereum fundamentals debate amid broader market decline. Network issues impact long-term performance.
news.summary: The price of Ethereum dropped in line with the overall cryptocurrency market decline, but its sustained downtrend is primarily influenced by specific issues within the network.

news.headline: Lazarus Group used Chrome flaw in NFT game, deceiving users and taking their money; North Koreans behind it.
news.summary: North Korea dedicated extensive resources to developing and marketing a game that reportedly led users to spend significant amounts of money.

news.headline: Tesla kept its entire Bitcoin holdings in Q3. Automotive sales dropped a bit from Q2 2024, but leases rose slightly.
news.summary: Tesla's Q3 financial reports revealed a slight decrease in automotive sales in comparison to Q2 2024, while lease numbers saw a slight uptick.

news.headline: Quantum algorithms by NVIDIA CUDA-Q boost solar energy prediction, offering faster and more accurate results.
news.summary: The use of NVIDIA CUDA-Q and cuDNN has led to advancements in quantum algorithms for predicting solar energy, resulting in notable enhancements in both speed and accuracy. As detailed in the NVIDIA Technical Blog, these technologies have significantly improved the performance of solar energy prediction models.

news.headline: AST SpaceMobile is awarded an OT agreement by SDA. They are the first space-based cellular network. #ASTS #government #contracts
news.summary: In Midland, Texas, AST SpaceMobile, Inc. revealed its selection by the Space Development Agency (SDA) for an Other Transaction (OT) agreement. This agreement will allow AST SpaceMobile to compete for prototype demonstration projects as part of the Hybrid Acquisition for proliferated Low-earth Orbit initiative. AST SpaceMobile is known for developing the first space-based cellular broadband network accessible via regular smartphones. The company, traded on NASDAQ as ASTS, targets both commercial and government uses. This partnership with SDA opens up opportunities for future projects in the space technology sector.

news.headline: Total Play reported 12% EBITDA growth to Ps.5,390 million in Q3 2024, with revenue at Ps.11,117 million, up 10%. EBITDA margin stood at 48%. Additionally, Capex accounted for 26.5% of revenue. The company recorded operating income of Ps.1,147 million and a net loss of Ps.1,087 million. Subscribers reached 5,124,433 in the period. Total Play's debt rose to Ps.53,736 million. Operating income for Q1-Q3 2024 was Ps.2,872 million, signifying an increase from the Ps.1,711 million recorded in the same period in 2023. The company's net loss for Q1-Q3 2024 was Ps.5,984 million, up from a loss of Ps.2,123 million in the corresponding period of 2023. Total Play's debt ratio was 2.51 times.
news.summary: Total Play Telecomunicaciones, a top Mexican telecommunications firm, revealed its financial performance for Q3 2024. The company attained a significant EBITDA margin of 48%, the highest since its public debt release. Capex for the quarter was 26.5% of revenue, an improvement from 36.9% a year ago. The balance of EBITDA after subtracting Capex and interest reached Ps.781 million. In this quarter, revenue was Ps.11,117 million, up 10% from the previous year. EBITDA rose by 12% to Ps.5,390 million, with an EBITDA margin of 48%. The company reported an operating income of Ps.1,147 million. Net loss was Ps.1,087 million, improving from Ps.2,130 million in Q3 2023. Total Play achieved 5,124,433 subscribers this period, a 9% increase from a year ago. The company's debt with cost was Ps.53,736 million. Cash and cash equivalents stood at Ps.5,886 million, up 6% YoY. The company's net debt was Ps.52,664 million. For the first nine months of 2024, Total Play reported revenues of Ps.33,355 million, up 12% from the previous year. EBITDA for this period was Ps.15,474 million, with an EBITDA margin of 46%. Operating income reached Ps.2,872 million. Total Play recorded a net loss of Ps.5,984 million, compared to Ps.2,123 million a year ago. Total Play continues to show strong financial performance, driving growth and maintaining its position in the Mexican telecom market.

Leafly, a key resource for cannabis enthusiasts, will not conduct an earnings call. Leafly aids numerous users in exploring cannabis annually, offering informative tools for informed purchases.

news.headline: Newmont Corp (NYSE: NEM) Q3 results: 76 cents per share earnings, $4.6 billion revenue, 1.7M gold oz produced. Gold AISC $1,611/oz.
news.summary: Newmont Corporation (NYSE:NEM) released its third-quarter results post-market on Wednesday. The report revealed quarterly GAAP earnings at 76 cents per share and quarterly revenue totaling $4.605 billion, surpassing the anticipated $4.568 billion. The company's production included 1.7 million attributable gold ounces, with significant contributions from 1.4 million gold ounces from Newmont’s Tier 1 portfolio and 430 thousand gold equivalent ounces (GEOs) from other sources like copper, silver, zinc, and lead. This also entailed 37 thousand tonnes of copper. Gold AISC per ounce rose by 3% to $1,611 per ounce primarily due to elevated CAS. This increase was highlighted against the previous quarter’s figures. For further details, the complete report is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Nevada King reveals private placement for potential $10M in common shares.
news.summary: The latest data indicates that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, which is the lowest it has been in seven years. This decrease represents a significant improvement from the previous rate of 6% recorded last month. Additionally, the new report shows that the economy added 250,000 jobs in the past month, exceeding analysts' expectations. These positive trends suggest a strengthening labor market and overall economic recovery.

news.headline: ServiceNow beats Q3 earnings and revenue estimates, stock dips as guidance disappoints investors.
news.summary: Shares of ServiceNow fell after the company reported its third-quarter earnings which exceeded analyst expectations in terms of revenue. However, the guidance provided by the enterprise software maker for future performance did not meet investors' expectations, causing the stock to decrease. The stock price of ServiceNow dropped following this announcement.

news.headline: Impinj surpasses Q3 estimates, raises guidance, causing stock to surge; detailed in Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Impinj, a manufacturer of tracking chips, exceeded analyst expectations for the third quarter and provided positive guidance for the current period. As a result, PI stock experienced a significant increase. The company's robust performance indicates strong market demand, with impressive financial results driving investor confidence in Impinj's prospects moving forward.

news.headline: IBM stock drops after Q3 report. AI business hits $3B, but revenue falls short at $20.5B. Earnings surpass.
news.summary: After IBM released its Q3 report, its stock experienced a decline. Although IBM's AI business reached $3 billion, the overall revenue in Q3 fell short of expectations. While the company's earnings exceeded predictions, its revenue did not meet the anticipated figures.

news.headline: Tesla's earnings rose by 9% in Q3 but revenue fell short. Stock jumped and Elon Musk's conference call is upcoming.
news.summary: In a surprising turn of events, Tesla reported a 9% increase in earnings for the third quarter, defying expectations. However, the company fell short of revenue predictions. Following this announcement, Tesla's stock experienced a late spike in trading, indicating positive investor sentiment. The anticipation is further heightened by an upcoming conference call hosted by CEO Elon Musk. The live coverage of the event is being closely followed by investors and analysts alike.

news.headline: Stock market sell-off with rising Treasury yields; Tesla's earnings surprise, soaring, with Elon Musk to appear.
news.summary: On Wednesday, the stock market experienced a sell-off due to the continuous rise in Treasury yields. Tesla reported unexpectedly high earnings, leading to a surge in its stock price. Elon Musk is set to discuss the company's performance. Dow Jones Futures were influenced by these developments, with live coverage available for updates.

news.headline: Update on private placement flow-through financing of $300,000 provided by CLM.
news.summary: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 3.8%, the lowest it has been in five years. The number of new jobs created in the last month alone totaled 250,000, exceeding economists' expectations. Additionally, wages have seen a 3% increase compared to the same time last year. This positive economic data has been attributed to increased consumer spending and a booming job market.

news.headline: KMT-Hansa Corp closes private placement, issues 10,008,714 units at $0.035 each, raising $350,305 in gross proceeds.
news.summary: In Toronto on October 23, 2024, KMT-Hansa Corp. announced the issuance of 10,008,714 units at $0.035 per unit, totaling $350,305 in gross proceeds. Each unit includes one common share and half of one common share purchase warrant. The warrants allow holders to purchase one common share at $0.05 per warrant until 5:00 p.m. on October 21, 2025.

news.headline: US election expected to drive increased cryptocurrency involvement, according to Bloomberg.
EyeTracking LLC's PilotReady® software, featuring eye tracking and biometrics, presented by FlightSafety International at NBAA-BACE conference in Las Vegas, enhancing pilot training.
news.summary: A recent unveiling showcased EyeTracking's PilotReady® solution at the NBAA-BACE event in San Diego. This innovative technology combines eye tracking and biometrics to improve pilot training. Demonstrated by FlightSafety International, this cutting-edge solution aims to enhance the training experience for pilots.

news.headline: LuxCreo partners with EMA Sleep to manufacture EMA 3D Device for Obstructive Sleep Apnea, impacting 40M Americans.
news.summary: LuxCreo, Inc., a prominent provider of customized medical and dental solutions, has collaborated with EMA Sleep, Inc. to enhance the production of the renowned EMA device to address Obstructive Sleep Apnea (OSA). OSA affects over 40 million individuals in the U.S. and if not managed, it can result in serious health issues like heart disease, strokes, and daytime sleepiness. The EMA device, developed by Dr. Don Frantz over 30 years ago, is a leading tool for treating OSA.

news.headline: Core Laboratories Inc. reported impressive Q3 2024 results with revenue of $134.4M, operating income of $19.8M, 14% operating margins, EPS of $0.25, free cash flow of $10.4M, net debt reduced by $11.8M, and debt leverage ratio at 1.47. Reservoir Description revenue was $88.8M, up 3% sequentially, while Production Enhancement revenue was $45.6M, up 3% sequentially. Q4 dividend announced. Company expects continued positive cash flow and anticipates future growth opportunities.
news.summary: Core Laboratories Inc. reported third quarter 2024 revenue of $134.4 million, up 3% sequentially and over 7% year-over-year. The operating income was $19.8 million, with diluted EPS of $0.25. Operating margins stood at 14%. The company achieved a debt leverage ratio of 1.47 and also announced a quarterly dividend. Reservoir Description operations saw revenue of $88.8 million, up 3% sequentially, while Production Enhancement operations had revenue of $45.6 million, up 3% sequentially. The company expects fourth quarter revenue to range from $128.5 million to $135.5 million. Core Labs aims to continue generating positive free cash flow and enhancing return on invested capital. The global outlook for crude oil demand supports Core's growth opportunities. Core remains focused on reducing debt leverage while evaluating ways to increase shareholder value.

news.headline: Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ: TER) reports Q3'24 revenue of $737 million, up 5% from Q3'23 with an EPS of $0.90.
news.summary: In the latest quarter, Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ: TER) posted a revenue of $737 million, exhibiting a 5% increase from the same period last year. This growth was primarily fueled by robust demand in the AI sector. The company exceeded Q3 guidance, with earnings coming in at $0.89 GAAP EPS and $0.90 non-GAAP EPS. This marked an improvement from the previous quarter’s revenue of $730 million. Teradyne's performance in Q3'24 surpassed expectations, with revenue at the high-end and earnings surpassing guidance.

news.headline: Human Platelet Lysate market to grow by USD 0.011 million from 2024-2028, driven by AI and chronic diseases.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the significant impact of artificial intelligence on market evolution, specifically focusing on the Global Human Platelet Lysate Market. Over the period of 2024-2028, this market is projected to witness a substantial growth of USD 0.011 million. This growth is expected to occur at a steady compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 3.64%. The transformative role of AI in driving market dynamics underscores the potential for considerable expansion in this sector in the coming years.

news.headline: ServiceNow reports Q3 earnings: Revenue beats at $2.797B, EPS beats at $3.72. Total revenue up 22% YoY. Customers surpass 2,020.
news.summary: ServiceNow Inc (NYSE:NOW) released its Q3 financial results, surpassing expectations with reported revenue of $2.797 billion, higher than the anticipated $2.743 billion. The company also exceeded analyst estimates for adjusted earnings, reporting $3.72 per share compared to the expected $3.46 per share. Total revenue saw a 22% increase year-over-year, with subscription revenues up by 23%. ServiceNow disclosed remaining performance obligations of $9.36 billion, reflecting a 26% increase from the previous year. The company highlighted a customer base milestone, reaching 2,020 clients with over $1 million in annual contract value, marking a 14% growth from the previous year. The updated financial guidance was also raised for the full year.

news.headline: Lam Research (NASDAQ: LRCX) Q1 earnings beat estimates: 86 cents/share vs. 80 cents/share, revenue at $4.17B vs $4.051B.
news.summary: Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) released its first-quarter results after the market closed on Wednesday. The report revealed earnings of 86 cents per share, surpassing the analyst expectation of 80 cents. Quarterly revenue stood at $4.17 billion, exceeding the analyst consensus of $4.051 billion and marking a growth from the previous year's $3.482 billion in sales. For more information, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Crypto market down with Bitcoin at $66,169.96 (-2%), Ethereum at $2,503.20 (-4.8%), Dogecoin at $0.1364 (-2.7%). Daily active addresses fell by 12.5%, with large transactions down to 7,886 and traders losing $228.61 million in liquidations.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets experienced a downturn on Wednesday, leading to the highest crypto long liquidations since Oct. 15. Prices of major cryptocurrencies are as follows: Bitcoin at $66,169.96 (-2%), Ethereum at $2,503.20 (-4.8%), Solana at $170.11 (+0.99%), Dogecoin at $0.1364 (-2.7%), and Shiba Inu at $0.00001738 (-4.9%). IntoTheBlock data indicates a slight increase of 0.7% in large transaction volume and a 12.5% drop in daily active addresses, with transactions over $100,000 decreasing from 8,957 to 7,886 in a day. Exchanges netflows are down by 716.6%. Coinglass data shows 83,751 traders liquidated in the past 24 hours for $228.61 million, with crypto long liquidations reaching $196.3 million, the highest since Oct. 15.In recent developments, a Bitcoin Spot ETF recorded a $79 million outflow after a 7-day inflow streak, Bitcoin advocates responded to the European Central Bank's criticisms citing 'vested interest,' and Gary Gensler extended birthday wishes to Bitcoin.

news.headline: Imperial Metals Corp reports 15.515M pounds copper, 13,551 oz gold production for Q3 2024, slight changes from Q2.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on October 23, 2024, Imperial Metals Corporation disclosed its quarterly copper and gold production figures from the Mount Polley and Red Chris mines. The company reported a total production of 15.515 million pounds of copper and 13,551 ounces of gold. This marks a slight increase in copper production from the previous quarter's 15.501 million pounds, while gold production saw a minor decrease from 13,768 ounces. The corporation is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol III.

news.headline: Pinnacle West raises quarterly dividend by 1.7%, from 6 cents to 32 cents per common share annually.
news.summary: Pinnacle West Capital, based in Phoenix, announced an increase in its dividend today. The company's board approved a raise of approximately 1.7%, equivalent to a 6-cent increase per common share on an annual basis.
